meta.summary: New standalone lookup/support table "Tags", a thin adapter over the generic table/authorization/for-select framework, mirroring the Sources module (spec 0018) and ReferentTypes (spec 0016) 1:1. Single business field: name (required text). Unlike Sources, Tags are REUSABLE: a Tag attaches to any entity through a POLYMORPHIC `taggables` pivot. First producer wired now = Referents (spec 0016), so the module is real and its delete-guard is testable. Deleting a Tag that is attached to at least one record is BLOCKED with an explicit 409 message.

decisions.decision: Model=Tag, table=tags, resource key / permission prefix / i18n namespace / table domain = "tags", route param {tag}.

User-approved (AskUserQuestion): association is POLYMORPHIC via a `taggables` pivot (tag_id + taggable morph), so a Tag is attachable to ANY entity without schema changes. Delete is blocked if ANY taggables row references the tag.

User-approved: minimal initial wiring on the EA-Sectors ("settori attività") side to produce real associations — EaSector morphToMany(Tag,'taggable'); the ea-sector create/edit form gains a `tag_ids` multi-select. No other module is wired now (extensible later).

CORRECTION (2026-07-07, post-build): tags were first mis-wired to Referents. The producer is EaSector, NOT Referent. The Referent tag wiring (relation, tag_ids field, form multi-select, resource keys, tagging tests) is fully REMOVED; the identical wiring is added to EaSector. The standalone Tag module and the polymorphic `taggables` pivot are unchanged.
No old_id / external-migration source now (add later if Tags needs import).

table.name: taggables
table.note: polymorphic pivot; taggable_id has NO db FK (morph); tag_id restrictOnDelete as a db-level backstop behind the service guard

permissions.note: Generated automatically by permissions:sync from TagPolicy + the navigation entry. No manual permission-string list.

endpoint.note: declared FIRST so the literal wins over the {tag} wildcard
409 if attached to any record (taggables exists)

ea-sector-wiring.note: minimal producer of associations — EaSector is the taggable entity
ea-sector-wiring.relation: Tag morphedByMany(EaSector::class, 'taggable') as eaSectors() [used only for cleanliness/tests]
ea-sector-wiring.hook: EaSector 'deleting' model event detaches its tags (pivot cleanup; taggable_id has no db FK)
ea-sector-wiring.payload: EaSector Store/Update gains optional tag_ids: number[] (each exists:tags,id); EaSectorService syncs via tags()->sync()
ea-sector-wiring.resource: EaSectorResource exposes tags: [{ id, name }] AND tag_ids: number[] (detail + edit-form hydration/default value)
ea-sector-wiring.authorization: EaSectorsAuthorization gains field tag_ids type 'multiselect' honoring the field-permission matrix
ea-sector-wiring.frontend: EaSector create/edit form gains a tags multi-select bound to /tags/for-select; schema tag_ids: number[] optional; payload builders send tag_ids on create and diff on update
ea-sector-wiring.removed: ALL Referent tag wiring is removed: Referent::tags() + deleting hook, tagIds in Create/UpdateReferentData, tag_ids rules in Store/UpdateReferentRequest, ReferentService sync, tags/tag_ids in ReferentResource, tag_ids field in ReferentsAuthorization, ReferentMetaTest field-list revert, ReferentTaggingTest deleted; frontend features/referents tag_ids in types/schema/payload/use-referent-form/form-details-tab/form-body + referents i18n tag strings + test fixtures.

acceptance-criteria.ac: Migration creates tags + taggables tables; up+down reversible; taggables has unique(tag_id,taggable_id,taggable_type).
Full CRUD via REST returns the standard envelope; store=201, destroy=204.
Every endpoint authorizes server-side; user without permission -> 403.
GET /meta/tags returns field metadata (name text, mandatory) honoring the per-role field-permission matrix.
Table domain 'tags' returns rows with name+created_at, supports filter/sort/search; generic export works.
for-select returns { id, label } paginated + hydrates explicit ids.
DELETE /tags/{tag} on a tag attached to >=1 record returns 409 with an explicit message and does NOT delete; DELETE on an unattached tag returns 204.

An EaSector can be created/updated with tag_ids; the pivot reflects the selection; EaSectorResource returns tags + tag_ids; deleting an EaSector detaches its tags (no orphan pivot rows). Referents no longer have any tag field.

Frontend: tags list page (grid + toolbar), create/edit/view sheet forms, Can-gated New button and route, i18n en/it, deleteForbidden(403) + deleteInUse(409) toasts; the EA-SECTOR form shows a working tags multi-select; the referent form no longer shows a tags field.
Navigation entry tags -> /tags visible with tags.view.
Backend Pest (crud, for-select, meta, security, table, delete-guard, referent-tagging) + frontend vitest green; Pint + tsc + ESLint clean.
